A '''[[Color/Legends|red]] [[pachydermoid]] species''' of [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] lived on a [[Unidentified planet (red pachydermoid species)|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], near the border of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. They had short trunks which ended in white tendrils, and had a large tusk on each side of this trunk. The [[Species/Legends|species]] also had large [[Ear/Legends|ears]] and three-fingered hands.<ref name="Flash">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Flashpoint]]''</ref>

[[File:RPS_fighting_Mandos.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The species fights against [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].]]

The species was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] from at least the time of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Exar Kun War]].<ref name="TOTJ">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]]</ref> Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was conquered by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], before the [[Battle of Vanquo]].<ref name="Flash" /> Afterwards, at least two members of the species joined the Mandalorian forces, and were present on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].<ref name="Knights">[[Knights of the Old Republic 24|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 24]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This species first appeared in the comic ''Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War'', published in [[1995]], as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] for an unnamed region. It was not seen again until ''Star Wars Knights of the Old Republic: Flashpoint'', published in [[2006]]. [[Dustin Weaver]], penciller for that issue, referenced this obscure species as a fun tie in to the old series.<ref name="Weaver">{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=boards/viewtopic.php?t=10089&postdays=0&postorder=asc&start=60|thread=KNIGHTS of the OLD REPUBLIC #8 - The doctor will see you now|user=Dustin Weaver|date=2006-10-14|time=2:40}}</ref>
